rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO FIX RESIDENCE OUTSIDE THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Kilby Stenkamp And Vanguard Properties, Inc. To Strike Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: The motion to strike is moot in light of the ruling on the demurrer. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 10, 2019.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Amended Petition To Obtain Personal Property
rulings.Rulings: Chicago Title Company's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Petitioner's amendment to address the order sustaining the demurrer to the prior version of the petition was to add a boilerplate, conclusory allegation of agency. That allegation, which amounts to a conclusion of law, is unsupported by any factual allegations that would make Respondent more than an escrow agent or would make it an actionable information provider. Petitioner has suggested no facts in opposition that would create an actionable agency relationship or duty on the part of Respondent to Petitioner. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 10, 2019.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petitioner Donald Trammel By And Through His Guardian Ad Litem Clinton Killians Amended Petition To Obtain Possession Of Real And Personal Property Under Probate Code Sections 850, 859
rulings.Rulings: The Demurrer of Kelly Stenkamp and Vanguard Properties is sustained with leave to amend. Neither the boilerplate, conclusory allegation of agency nor the other pleaded allegations are sufficient to state a claim under Probate Code section 850 or 859 as to these Respondents. Petitioner's Opposition relies on facts not alleged in the Petition. Petitioner may amend within 15 days to add sufficient allegations if he can do so in good faith. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 10, 2019.

The demurrer of Respondents Caroline Ingeborn and Gustav Lindqvist is sustained with leave to amend. Neither the boilerplate, conclusory allegation of agency nor other facts pleaded are sufficient to state a claim against these Respondents. The Opposition refers to facts not pleaded in the petition. If Petitioner can do so in good faith, he may amend his petition within 15 days. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 10, 2019.
